# SOURCE-10XS: Russell Brunson — 10x Secrets

> **Versão:** 1.0.0
> **Data:** 2026-03-19
> **Pessoa:** Russell Brunson
> **Programa:** 10x Secrets (Grant Cardone 10X Growth Conference Bundle)
> **Tipo:** Course + Live Event + Workshop + Masterclass Interviews
> **Arquivos:** 56 transcrições | 3.2 MB | 5 seções
> **Elementos Extraídos:** ~125 novos (DNA v29)

---

## VISÃO GERAL

10x Secrets é o programa que Russell Brunson criou a partir de sua participação no 10X Growth Conference de Grant Cardone, onde fechou $3.2 milhões em 90 minutos do palco. O programa contém:

1. **01-Course (24 files, 1.2MB)** — Core training sobre stage selling, Perfect Webinar em ação, The Stack, Event Choreography, OTOs, Landing Pages, e a célebre apresentação Story Selling do FHL 2017
2. **02-FHAT (10 files, 1MB)** — Funnel Hack-A-Thon: workshop intensivo de 3 dias cobrindo Expert Secrets ao vivo (massa movement, new opportunity, Epiphany Bridge, Stack & Close)
3. **03-FHAT Pitches (8 files, 305KB)** — Russell construindo e entregando pitches AO VIVO para produtos de outras pessoas (Alison Prince, Katie Richardson, Holly Homer, Ron Wilson)
4. **04-Childers Chunks (6 files, 231KB)** — John Childers ensinando seu sistema modular de platform selling: chunks de persuasão, Wealth Formula, Three Walls, GROWTH Close
5. **05-10x Secrets Masterclass (8 files, 481KB)** — Entrevistas com masters: Ted Thomas (trial closing), Kaelin Poulin (FB Live webinars), Jaime Cross (physical products), John Childers, Armand Morin (The Stack inventor), Myron Golden (price marinade + repitch), Jason Fladlien (affiliate webinars + objection marathon)

## DOMÍNIOS COBERTOS

- **stage-selling** — Event choreography, table rush mechanics, constraint/release
- **webinar-selling** — Perfect Webinar refinements, weekly model, compression for any format
- **trial-closing** — Ted Thomas system (35-105 per 90 min)
- **price-psychology** — Price Marinade, Price Anchoring, Two Choices Close
- **platform-selling** — Childers Chunk System, modular presentation architecture
- **affiliate-webinars** — Fladlien's $25M methodology, exclusive bonus positioning
- **fb-live-selling** — Kaelin's compressed Perfect Webinar for Facebook Live
- **physical-product-webinars** — Jaime Cross's 5-min Perfect Webinar for $30 products
- **mass-movement-building** — Culture toolkit, manifestos, identity labels, milestones
- **story-selling** — Hero's Two Journeys, Epiphany Bridge in practice
- **repitch-methodology** — Emotion→Logic→Urgency, Myron Golden's Q&A repitch
- **high-ticket-closing** — Selection Close ($50K+), Preacher Closing
- **offer-construction** — De-commoditization, stack building, bonus architecture
- **objection-handling** — Story inventory, "you're probably thinking", Socratic method

---

## KEY FRAMEWORKS EXCLUSIVOS DO 10XS

### Event Choreography Framework
Pre-event hooks → Audience energy management → Intro video with social proof → Origin story with vulnerability → Three secrets with stories → Price marinade early → Stack with visual slides → Constraint introduction → Table rush mechanics → Post-close second-day offer

### Childers Presentation Shell (12 Chunks)
American Dream → Working Hard Doesn't Work → Inflation & Taxes → Debt Leverage → IDEAL Formula → Wealth Formula → Three Walls → Minefield → Method of Learning → Testimonial → Your Story → GROWTH Close

### FHAT Pitch Construction (5 Phases)
Interview/Discovery → Whiteboard Brainstorm → Short Break (organize notes) → Deliver Live in Character → Debrief (record + transcribe = script)

### Trial Close System (Ted Thomas)
Target: 100+ "yes" responses before asking for money. After every testimonial: 4-5 trial closes. After every teaching point: 1-2 trial closes. Result: 75% increase in $/registrant.

### Price Marinade (Myron Golden)
Reveal high anchor at beginning → Get commitment → Deliver value while price "soaks in" → Reveal actual (lower) price → Relief response → Close

### Affiliate Bonus Architecture (Jason Fladlien)
Study vendor's product → Create EXCLUSIVE bonuses (can't be purchased) → Pay premium experts as bonuses → Show proof of investment → Spend 95% of pitch on bonuses → Recruit sub-affiliates

### Culture Building Toolkit
Self-identification label → T-shirt/wearable → Mini Manifesto (phone screensaver) → Full Manifesto → Title of Liberty → Four-Minute Mile Marker (Two Comma Club)
